title: poa calycina var. mathewsii
intro: Poa calycina var. mathewsii, also known as Poa calycina, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is a type of grass native to Australia, and its leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The medicinal properties of Poa calycina var. mathewsii include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to the presence of certain compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
